commands.command: repeat preparation plus complete asset SHA-256 comparison
actionlint .github/workflows/*.yml; bash -n scripts/source-retention/*.sh; node --check scripts/source-retention/release-tools.mjs; git diff --check

forced-boundary self-test produced five ordered parts and exact reconstruction; production ceiling is 1.9 GB

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: clean reconstruction without local or CI cache

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: ADR-0010 classification blocks mandatory replica triggers
acceptance_comparisons.observed: both sources explicitly classified; zero triggers; missing, extra, malformed, or triggered classifications fail preparation

failure_history.failure: An optional Ruby YAML validation command used a keyword unsupported by the system Ruby version.
failure_history.recovery: Reran the syntax check with the compatible API and used installed actionlint as the workflow authority.

recovery_result.summary: All final local implementation and reconstruction checks passed.
